margin_repair.operation: multiply every element of existing initializer poly by float32 8
margin_repair.expected_effect: uniform positive scale of the output-only terminal Einsum

authority.label: authority

conv_bias.interpretation: No Conv-family node; UB0 is vacuous.

authority.no_lookup_reason: Complete graph has only standard arithmetic contractions/addition; all 66/70 constants are small, live coefficients, with no index/table/branch operator.

candidate.label: candidate

conv_bias.interpretation: No Conv-family node; UB0 is vacuous.

candidate.no_lookup_reason: Complete graph has only standard arithmetic contractions/addition; all 66/70 constants are small, live coefficients, with no index/table/branch operator.

regression_attribution.interpretation: Known failures where authority is correct and candidate is wrong are candidate-added. Fresh authority failures are authority heuristic weakness; comparison tables separately record whether candidate repairs, shares, or adds each failure.

private_zero.classification: normal POLICY90 candidate; no private-zero exception claimed
